subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team.

We’d be glad to set up an introductory call next week. The following slots work on our side:

- 2026-04-21 between 14:00 and 16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-22 between 14:00 and 16:00
- 2026-04-23 between 14:00 and 16:00

Please let us know which of these options you prefer, and we’ll send over a calendar invite with dial-in details.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone numbers for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For high-level contact details and general inquiries, please refer to the public information available on our company website.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
